_comment: Scenario probes for P1 (single practitioner, dynamic location): covers CONFIRMATION split, slot-offer count, wrong-intent on confirm, find_next_available routing, and year-anchor.

scenarios.name: C1 — Confirmation: spoken phrase AND silent universal_router tool call together

history.content: Can I book a physio appointment on Friday afternoon?
When would you like to come in?

[smart_voice_agent response]: {"found": true, "response_type": "availability", "session_id": "sess_abc", "first_available": {"practitioner_name": "Sarah Jones", "practitioner_id": "prac_1", "business_id": "biz_1", "business_name": "Northside Physio", "date": "2026-06-19", "day_of_week": "Friday", "time": null}, "practitioners": [{"practitioner_name": "Sarah Jones", "practitioner_id": "prac_1", "dates": [{"date": "2026-06-19", "slot_groups": {"afternoon": ["1:00 PM", "2:00 PM", "3:00 PM", "4:00 PM", "5:00 PM"]}, "business_id": "biz_1", "business_name": "Northside Physio"}]}]}

scenarios.expected_behavior: PASS if: (1) agent speaks a confirmation phrase (e.g. 'Perfect, 1:00 PM Friday the 19th with Sarah at Northside Physio.') AND (2) calls universal_router intent='confirm_time' in the SAME response turn. FAIL if: agent speaks the phrase on this turn without calling the tool, OR calls the tool without speaking the phrase, OR calls smart_voice_agent instead of universal_router.

scenarios.name: S1 — Slot offer count: exactly 2 times spoken (first and last only)

history.content: [smart_voice_agent response]: {"found": true, "response_type": "availability", "session_id": "sess_abc", "first_available": {"practitioner_name": "Sarah Jones", "practitioner_id": "prac_1", "business_id": "biz_1", "business_name": "Northside Physio", "date": "2026-06-22", "day_of_week": "Monday", "time": null}, "practitioners": [{"practitioner_name": "Sarah Jones", "practitioner_id": "prac_1", "dates": [{"date": "2026-06-22", "slot_groups": {"morning": ["8:00 AM", "9:00 AM", "10:00 AM", "11:00 AM"]}, "business_id": "biz_1", "business_name": "Northside Physio"}]}]}

history.expected_behavior: PASS if agent speaks exactly two times: 8:00 AM and 11:00 AM (first and last), using the form 'I've got 8:00 AM or 11:00 AM — does either of those work for you?' FAIL if agent lists 3 or more times (e.g. '8:00 AM, 9:00 AM, 10:00 AM, or 11:00 AM'), or lists only one time when 4 are available.

history.name: N1 — Find-next-available: asap_slots intent on 'next available' request
history.expected_behavior: PASS if agent says 'Checking that now, one moment.' and calls smart_voice_agent with intent='asap_slots' and a start_date derived from {{current_time_local}}. FAIL if agent calls with intent='availability' (missing date), intent='find_next_available', or offers hardcoded dates without calling the tool.

history.name: Y1 — Year anchor: date labelled using current_time_local year, not training-data year

history.content: Do you have anything next Monday?

[smart_voice_agent response]: {"found": true, "response_type": "availability", "session_id": "sess_abc", "first_available": {"practitioner_name": "Sarah Jones", "practitioner_id": "prac_1", "business_id": "biz_1", "business_name": "Northside Physio", "date": "2026-06-22", "day_of_week": "Monday", "time": "9:00 AM"}, "practitioners": [{"practitioner_name": "Sarah Jones", "practitioner_id": "prac_1", "dates": [{"date": "2026-06-22", "slot_groups": {"morning": ["9:00 AM"]}, "business_id": "biz_1", "business_name": "Northside Physio"}]}]}

history.expected_behavior: PASS if the confirmation phrase contains '2026' (e.g. '9:00 AM Monday the 22nd') and the universal_router confirm_time payload has appointment_date='2026-06-22'. FAIL if the year in the payload is 2025 or any year other than 2026, indicating the node ignored {{current_time_local}} and inferred the year from training data.
